title: SE Ranking Domain Overview
description: Domain-level SEO overview data including organic traffic estimates, keyword counts, domain authority, and competitive positioning.

domain.description: The root domain being analyzed (e.g., example.com).

organic_keywords.description: Number of keywords for which the domain ranks in organic search results.

organic_cost.description: Estimated monthly value of organic traffic in USD.

paid_keywords.description: Number of paid search keywords the domain is running ads for.

paid_cost.description: Estimated monthly spend on paid search campaigns in USD.

domain_inlink_rank.description: SE Ranking domain authority score based on backlink profile.

referring_domains.description: Number of unique root domains linking to this domain.

total_backlinks.description: Total backlinks pointing to the domain.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the data region.

history.description: Historical monthly snapshots of domain metrics.
